title: Shenhua Shift Coal Dynamics Whats The Rationale
section_path: Shenhua Shift Coal Dynamics Whats The Rationale
section_path_text: Shenhua Shift Coal Dynamics Whats The Rationale
summary:
Main
On 12 August, after a seven-year pause, China Shenhua Group, China's biggest coal producer, once again launched a large-scale asset merge and acquisition program, marking the fulfillment of the agreement on "avoiding competition in the same industry". This agreement, first signed in 2005, was initially realized after the merger of National Energy Group with Shenhua and Guodian in 2018, and after two extensions, it was stipulated to be fully fulfilled before 2028. The biggest change this acquisition brought to Shenhua Group is that it enabled the company to control five related industries, realizing a closed loop from coal mining to downstream coal product sales.
